response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in testing, TDD, and distributed/high-throughput systems (notably Sociomantic handling millions of req/s). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core focus of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Title is 'Senior/Staff' rather than Principal-level IC6, and there's limited evidence of multi-team platform leadership at enterprise scale.
strengths: 15+ years engineering experience across multiple languages (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D) with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s)
Track record of building reusable frameworks/tooling (test runners, MCP code generators, GIS platform) and mentoring via workshops
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout/risk controls
Lacks explicit metrics/telemetry infrastructure and statistical analysis background
No clear evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-org influence or multi-workstream platform ownership

key_factors.factor: Limited evidence of Principal-scale cross-team leadership
